description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push and pull request events. Configure a single ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 6.7.2 for linux_gcc_64, installs dependencies, configures CMake for a Release build, builds the project, runs tests, installs the project, downloads linuxdeploy tools, copies OpenSSL libraries, packages the project into an AppImage, and uploads the resulting artifact.
